vendor.short_description: Fictional Chinese warehouse robotics vendor preparing its first Italian pilot for AMR-based internal transport.

product_description: Mid-range autonomous mobile robot designed to move totes, cartons, and small carts between warehouse zones without installing fixed conveyors.
amr_use_cases: internal transport between picking and packing zones
tote movement from returns inspection to replenishment

technical_specs.navigation_type: SLAM navigation with mapped routes and obstacle detection

installation_requirements: charging location near the pilot route
Wi-Fi coverage along the selected route
pilot-area safety review for pedestrian and forklift interaction
integration_options: operator tablet dispatch for the first pilot
CSV task import from WMS export
REST API task handoff after IT review

pilot_shape.scope: one mapped route moving totes from picking aisles to packing benches in a 3PL or e-commerce fulfilment warehouse
pilot_shape.target_process: internal transport between picking and packing zones
measurable_kpis: manual walking time reduced on the selected route
totes moved per hour during agreed pilot windows
operator handoff time at pickup and drop-off points
risk_reducers: operator tablet workflow before deeper WMS integration
pilot_shape.next_commercial_step: If the pilot meets agreed KPIs and support expectations, propose a paid expansion to six AMRs across picking-to-packing and dispatch staging.

available: fictional demo case outline from a similar Chinese fulfilment workflow

known_constraints: WMS integration should start with operator tablet dispatch or CSV task import to avoid long IT approval
Italian-language operator and supervisor material must be prepared before the pilot
